scope: RFX LOOP-07 reliability-freeze guard + LOOP-08 telemetry-enforced SLO gate, OBS+REP coupling, anti-gaming defense, light-version trend memory.

instability_thresholds.rationale: Conservative defaults: any concentration of failures into the most recent quarter of the window beyond half the window's failures fires burst; same reason_code seen twice marks a recurring pattern; replay mismatch above 10% triggers drift; composite instability >=0.5 forces freeze. All thresholds are overrideable via RFXFailureProfileThresholds for governed-policy tuning.

freeze_propagation_behavior.ownership_note: Phase-label-neutral signal. Canonical enforcement authority remains in docs/architecture/system_registry.md; the freeze record signals halt-requested rather than emitting a canonical authority verb.
guarantees: caller-supplied targets are unioned with required set; cannot be omitted

loop08_cross_check.description: Fires when SLO posture is in {pass, ok, within_budget, acceptable} while OBS is incomplete (missing trace segments, artifact linkage, or failure logs) or when the SLO record does not declare an OBS source (obs_ref / source_obs_id / derived_from_obs_id matching obs_id).

rules: Every OBS-recorded trace must have at least one artifact linkage entry
Every replay record must reference a trace present in OBS coverage
Every OBS trace must have at least one matching replay record

vectors: Suppressed failure signals: recent_failures empty while OBS failure_logs non-empty
Suppressed failure signals: recent_failures empty while SLO carries explicit burn flags
Inconsistent metrics: zero failures recorded while replay results show mismatches
Inconsistent metrics: SLO ok-band while replay/OBS show failures
Missing slices: SLO ok-band while OBS missing required slices
Missing slices: SLO ok-band with no OBS record at all

known_blind_spots: Failure profile relies on numeric `timestamp_seconds` (or aliases) to detect burst/trend structure. Records without numeric timestamps are conservatively excluded from burst/trend computation; an attacker who scrubs all timestamps cannot trigger detection here, but the recurring-pattern and replay-drift signals remain active and the anti-gaming guard catches structural inconsistencies.

SLO derivation check accepts `obs_ref` / `source_obs_id` / `derived_from_obs_id` literal id matches; an attacker who fabricates a matching id without genuine derivation is not caught at this layer. Cross-system enforcement remains with OBS / SLO authorities (canonical roles in docs/architecture/system_registry.md).

OBS+REP consistency assumes a flat `artifact_linkage` list belongs to the primary trace_id; multi-trace OBS records must use the dict-keyed form `{trace_id: [artifact_refs]}` to be correctly cross-checked.

LOOP-07 is gated by explicit caller activation (telemetry inputs supplied or `enforce_loop07=True`) so existing LOOP-01..LOOP-06-only callers are not retroactively broken; promotion gating policy is responsible for requiring those telemetry inputs at the canonical entry point.
Trend memory currently stores a flat history of profiles; aggregation (slope of slopes, regime shifts) is left to RFX-05.
guarantees: no `looks good` pass with missing telemetry
no replay drift allowed into certification
